name: universal-email
description: Read and send mail through one or more standard IMAP and SMTP accounts.

interface.shortDescription: Read and send mail with multi-account IMAP and SMTP.
interface.longDescription: Universal Email connects Codex to one or more mailbox providers that expose standard IMAP and SMTP endpoints. Configure common providers with provider, email, and password or app password; override server details for custom mailboxes.
defaultPrompt: Read the latest unread messages from work.
Send an email from my personal account.
